story.text:
# рҹ“– Act 25: The Dragon's Hide
**act** В· swordsman В· narrative В· first_person

Where the Mesh Becomes Armour. Control plane vs data plane separation at the network layer. Tailnets, WireGuard mesh, NAT traversal, DERP relays. Each tunnel is a scale on the dragon's hide.
> *Control remembers. Data flows. Neither touches what the other holds.*

**Spell**   рҹ•ёпёҸрҹ”җрҹҢҗ вҶ’ вҡ”пёҸрҹ”‘вҠҘрҹ§ҷрҹ”‘В·рҹӨқ(mesh) вҶ’ рҹ“ЎвҠҘрҹ“ҰВ·рҹӘЎ(NAT) вҶ’ рҹ—әпёҸрҹ”®(MagicDNS) вҶ’ рҹҗІвҶ’рҹҗүрҹӣЎпёҸрҹ•ёпёҸ(tail-scale) вҶ’ рҹ•ёпёҸвҠҘвҳҒпёҸ(controlвҠҘdata) вҶ’ рҹҢҖвҲһ

## Edges out

- *follows* вҶ’ [[Act 26: Master and Emissary]]
- *narrates* вҶ’ [[Mesh Architecture]]
- *narrates* вҶ’ [[Mesh Sovereignty]]
- *narrates* вҶ’ [[Three-Axis Separation]]
- *narrates* вҶ’ [[Netkeeper рҹ—ЎпёҸрҹ•ёпёҸ]]
- *extends* вҶ’ [[Conditional Independence]]
- *references* вҶ’ [[Media Plurality]]

## Edges in

- [[Act 24: Holographic Bound]] *follows* вҶ’
- [[First Person Spellbook]] *defines* вҶ’
- [[Act 29: The Dragon Wakes]] *extends* вҶ’
